import * as React from "react"
import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot"
import { type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const buttonVariants = /**
 * @defaultVariants {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    }
 */
tw.variants({
    base: {
        display: "inline-flex",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        justifyContent: "justify-center",
        gap: "gap-2",
        whiteSpace: "whitespace-nowrap",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        fontWeight: "font-medium",
        transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
        "focus-visible": {
            outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
            boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-1", "focus-visible:ring-ring"],
        },
        disabled: {
            pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
            opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
        },
        "[&_svg]": {
            pointerEvents: "[&_svg]:pointer-events-none",
            width: "[&_svg]:size-4",
            flexShrink: "[&_svg]:shrink-0",
        },
    },
    variants: {
        variant: {
            default: {
                backgroundColor: "bg-primary",
                color: "text-primary-foreground",
                boxShadow: "shadow",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-primary/90",
                },
            },
            destructive: {
                backgroundColor: "bg-destructive",
                color: "text-destructive-foreground",
                boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-destructive/90",
                },
            },
            outline: {
                borderWidth: ["border", "border-input"],
                backgroundColor: "bg-background",
                boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-accent",
                    color: "hover:text-accent-foreground",
                },
            },
            secondary: {
                backgroundColor: "bg-secondary",
                color: "text-secondary-foreground",
                boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-secondary/80",
                },
            },
            ghost: {
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-accent",
                    color: "hover:text-accent-foreground",
                },
            },
            link: {
                color: "text-primary",
                textUnderlineOffset: "underline-offset-4",
                hover: {
                    textDecorationLine: "hover:underline",
                },
            },
        },
        size: {
            default: {
                height: "h-9",
                padding: ["px-4", "py-2"],
            },
            sm: {
                height: "h-8",
                borderRadius: "rounded-md",
                padding: "px-3",
                fontSize: "text-xs",
            },
            lg: {
                height: "h-10",
                borderRadius: "rounded-md",
                padding: "px-8",
            },
            icon: {
                height: "h-9",
                width: "w-9",
            },
        },
    },
})

export interface ButtonProps
  extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>,
    VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> {
  asChild?: boolean
}

const Button = React.forwardRef<HTMLButtonElement, ButtonProps>(
  ({ className, variant, size, asChild = false, ...props }, ref) => {
    const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button"
    return (
      <Comp
        className={tw.join(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
        ref={ref}
        {...props}
      />
    )
  }
)
Button.displayName = "Button"

export { Button, buttonVariants }
